utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan, all 5 appear. Check full specification: health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs—provided as two labeled items with costs (though plan names overlap, costs are present). property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs—provided with a plan name and monthly cost (contents vs home not explicitly separated, but 'home/contents' is implied; cost present). travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs—provided with cost. additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs—provided with cost. total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown—both monthly and annual costs provided. Therefore, all 5 items are present with required cost details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific products: EliteCare Premium Plan for physical health and for mental health; EliteHome Premium Coverage for property; EliteTravel Premium Plan for travel; and Premium Insurance Membership as an additional service. I matched each of these names exactly to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings and extracted their numeric ratings.
